question_text: What is the definition of power in physics?

options.label: A
options.text: The rate at which energy is transferred or used

options.label: B
options.text: The total amount of energy available in a system

options.label: C
options.text: The force applied to move an object

options.label: D
options.text: The speed at which an object moves

explanation: Power measures how quickly energy is being used or transferred. A powerful device transfers lots of energy in a short time, while a less powerful device transfers the same energy more slowly.
